moves.name: Mark Your Failure
moves.triggerShort: When you make a move and score a miss.
moves.trigger: When you make a move and score a miss, mark a tick on your failure track. If you score a miss when making a progress move, mark two ticks.
moves.notes: No roll — automatically triggered on any miss. Mark 1 tick on your failure track. On a miss from a progress move (Reach Your Destination, Locate Your Objective, etc.), mark 2 ticks instead.

moves.name: Learn From Your Failures
moves.triggerShort: When you spend time reflecting on your hardships and missteps.
moves.trigger: When you spend time reflecting on your hardships and missteps, and your failure track is +6 or greater, roll your challenge dice and compare to your progress. Momentum is ignored on this roll.

stats.desc: Roll against your failure progress track

moves.strong:
You commit to making a dramatic change. Take +3 experience and clear all progress. Then, choose one:
  • Adjust your approach: Discard a single asset, and take 2 experience for each marked ability.
  • Make an oath: Swear an Iron Vow, and reroll any dice.
  • Ready your next steps: Take +3 momentum.
moves.weak: You learn from your mistakes. Take +2 experience and clear all progress.
moves.miss: You've learned the wrong lessons. Take +1 experience and clear all progress. Then, envision how you set off on an ill-fated path.
moves.notes: Progress move — roll the challenge dice against your failure track. No action die. Momentum is ignored. Requires failure track to be +6 or greater. Always clears all failure track progress regardless of outcome.
